20.desc: Grants between 20 and 100 Funds when obtained.
20.name: Lucky Coupon

21.desc: For 3 turns, when you complete an activity, you gain a little Fitness.
21.name: Random Fitness Boost

22.desc: For 3 turns, when you complete an activity, you gain a little Knowledge.
22.name: Random Knowledge Boost

23.desc: For 3 turns, when you complete an activity, you gain a little Dexterity.
23.name: Random Dexterity Boost

24.desc: For 3 turns, when you complete an activity, you gain a little Sensitivity.

25.desc: For 3 turns, when you complete an activity, you gain some Fitness.

26.desc: For 3 turns, when you complete an activity, you gain some Knowledge.

27.desc: For 3 turns, when you complete an activity, you gain some Dexterity.
27.name: Random Dexterity Boost+

28.desc: For 3 turns, when you complete an activity, you gain some Sensitivity.
28.name: Random Sensitivity Boost+

29.desc: When the next turn ends, you gain a lot of Fitness.
29.name: Delayed Random Fitness Boost

30.desc: When the next turn ends, you gain a lot of Knowledge.
30.name: Delayed Random Knowledge Boost

31.desc: When the next turn ends, you gain a lot of Dexterity.
31.name: Delayed Random Dexterity Boost

32.desc: When the next turn ends, you gain a lot of Sensitivity.

33.desc: For 3 turns, when the turn starts, you recover a little Mood.
33.name: Random Mood Recovery

34.desc: For 3 turns, when the turn starts, you recover some Mood.
34.name: Random Mood Recovery+

35.desc: For 3 turns, when the turn starts, you recover a lot of Mood.
35.name: Random Mood Recovery++

36.desc: When the turn starts, you recover some Mood.
36.name: Permanent Random Mood Recovery

39.desc: For 3 turns, activities give more Fitness and less Knowledge.
39.name: Fitness Conversion - Knowledge

40.desc: For 3 turns, activities give more Knowledge and less Fitness.
40.name: Knowledge Conversion - Fitness

41.desc: For 3 turns, activities give more Dexterity and less Sensitivity.
41.name: Dexterity Conversion - Sensitivity

42.desc: For 3 turns, activities give more Sensitivity and less Dexterity.
42.name: Sensitivity Conversion - Dexterity

56.desc: Moderately increases stats gained from the 1st activity slot.

62.name: Even-Numbered Activity Slot Boost+

63.desc: Greatly increases stats gained from even-numbered activity slots.
63.name: Even-Numbered Activity Slot Boost++
